comment: Baselines for tests/perf_gate.sh. 5-run median wallclock decode tok/s.
Measured at uptime 1-min load < 3. CI runners get a slack multiplier
via PERF_GATE_TOLERANCE_PCT (default 5; CI bumps it to 10) so noise
doesn't bounce PRs. Refresh this file (with bench data in the commit)
when a real perf win lands; don't refresh it to mask a regression.
n=1024 cell uses tests/compare_mlx.sh's 'long' essay prompt.
